app.title: Steam Card Price Watch
col.games.name: Game
dlg.games_import.title: Wishlist import
dlg.games_import.no_steamid: Set your Steam ID first (Settings → Steam login) — can't locate the wishlist without it.
dlg.games_import.found: New games: {count}. Uncheck the ones you don't want.
dlg.games_remove.title: Remove games
status.games_lows_done: Minimum prices: {count} of {total}  •  at all-time low: {at_min}
status.games_lows_updated_min: Minimum prices updated: {count}  •  at all-time low: {at_min}
status.games_already_listed: This game is already in the list
dlg.games_add_url.bad: Doesn't look like a Steam link — need a URL like store.steampowered.com/app/12345/…
col.name: Card name
dlg.import.title: Import from Steam
dlg.import.in_development: This feature is still in development. It will sync your active Steam Market listings and buy orders here.
dlg.import.no_cookies: Sign in to Steam via «From browser (cookies)» in Settings first — without a session there's nothing to import.
dlg.import.nothing_found: No active listings or buy orders on Steam Market. Nothing to import.
import.session_expired: Steam session expired — log in again via «From browser (cookies)» in Settings.
dlg.import.conflict.title: Price conflict
dlg.import.conflict.buy_body:
You already have «{name}» at target {old} ₴.
Steam shows {new} ₴.

Replace the target with the new price?
dlg.import.conflict.sell_body:
You already have «{name}» at target {old} ₴.
Steam shows {new} ₴.

What do you want to do?
dlg.import.summary: Imported: sales {sell_new} new + {sell_upd} updated, buys {buy_new} new + {buy_upd} updated.
dlg.completed.title: Confirm transaction
dlg.completed.body_buy: What price did you buy «{name}» at? ({sym})
dlg.completed.body_sell: What price did you sell «{name}» at? ({sym})
dlg.completed.body_buy_multi: What price did you buy {count} cards at? ({sym})
dlg.completed.body_sell_multi: What price did you sell {count} cards at? ({sym})
dlg.choose_op.title: Add to which list?
dlg.games_readd.title: Return to Games
dlg.duplicate.title: Duplicate card
dlg.move.title: Move card
dlg.reset.title: Reset settings
dlg.reset.body:
Reset all settings to defaults (theme, language, font size, interval, etc.)? Window size will reset too.

Bot token and Chat ID will be preserved — they won't be touched.
dlg.steam_login.title: Steam login
dlg.steam_login.qr_body: Quick passwordless sign-in — scan a QR code in the Steam mobile app.
dlg.steam_login.browser_body: Import the current session from Chrome / Edge / Firefox / Opera. The browser will be closed automatically and relaunched after.
dlg.steam_login.manual_body: Enter your Steam ID or profile URL. Listing import won't work this way, but we'll pull the avatar and persona name.
dlg.steam_login.status_empty: Enter a Steam ID or profile URL.
dlg.steam_login.status_bad_format: Couldn't parse the ID — check the format.
toast.session_expired: Steam session expired — please log in again
dlg.steam_browser.title: Import cookies from browser
dlg.steam_browser.warn_unsaved: ⚠ {browser} will be force-closed and relaunched. Unsaved data (forms, drafts) will be lost.
dlg.steam_browser.none_found: No supported browsers found (Chrome / Edge / Firefox / Opera).
dlg.steam_browser.db_locked: Failed — {browser} isn't fully closed yet. Check Task Manager and try again.
dlg.steam_browser.no_session: No active Steam session in {browser} — log in to Steam and try again.
dlg.steam_browser.session_invalid: Cookies found but Steam rejects them — the session expired. Sign in via the browser again.
dlg.steam_browser.bad_cookie: Cookies are malformed — can't parse the Steam ID.
dlg.steam_browser.relaunch_failed: Done, but couldn't relaunch {browser} automatically — open it manually.
dlg.steam_browser.kill_timeout: Couldn't close {browser} automatically. Close it manually and click "Try again".
dlg.steam_browser.needs_admin: Cookies are encrypted (Chrome App-Bound Encryption v127+). A UAC prompt will appear — accept it to continue.
dlg.steam_browser.admin_denied: Admin rights denied. Without them cookies from {browser} can't be read.
dlg.steam_browser.admin_timeout: The admin helper didn't finish in time.
dlg.steam_browser.not_elevated: Helper launched but Windows didn't grant it admin rights. Your account may not be in the Administrators group, or UAC is configured in a way that blocks elevation. Run the program as administrator (right-click → "Run as administrator") and try again.
dlg.steam_browser.abe_blocked:
{browser} v131+ blocks third-party cookie reads via App-Bound Encryption v2 — Google built this specifically to defend against info-stealer malware, and legitimate tools like us get caught in the same net. This path is technically blocked right now.

Working alternatives:
  • Import from Edge, Opera or Firefox (all work)
  • Or enter your Steam ID manually below — we'll pull the avatar + persona, but listing import won't be available
dlg.hist_delete.title: Delete record
dlg.hist_edit.title: Edit price

dlg.rate_limited.title: Steam rate-limited
dlg.rate_limited.body:
Steam temporarily blocked our requests (HTTP 429).
Wait about {minutes} min and try again.

The next scheduled run will also be skipped until the cooldown ends.

dlg.lang_changed.body: Please restart the app for the language change to take effect.
log.config_missing: config.json not found — copy config.example.json and fill in credentials
log.watchlist_empty: Watchlist is empty — nothing to do
log.missing_target: Missing price or target for {name} (lowest={lowest} target={target})
log.leader_suppressed: {name} — you lead the market ({lowest:.2f}), duplicate alerts suppressed
log.batch_abort_rate_limited: Steam rate-limited on {name} — aborting batch, {remaining} cards left unchecked
log.skip_run_rate_limited: Skipping run — Steam rate-limited, cooldown until {until}
tg.test_message: ✅ Steam Card Price Watch — connection test
